Class CustomerDebt

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerDebt
public class CustomerDebt extends Object
Class that contains the comprehensive business logic for customer debt handling. Consists of complex database operations to manage customer debt lifecycles at scale.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CustomerDebt()
    Default constructor for CustomerDebt class.
    CustomerDebt(int customerID, float balance)
    Constructor for CustomerDebt class that's used to get slimmer information about a customer's debt in getDebtSimple(int customerID) and to upsert debt data into the database in upsertDebt(CustomerDebt cd, float creditLimit) for the PaymentService's credit transaction logic.
    CustomerDebt(int customerID, float balance, String status1Reminder, LocalDate date1Reminder, String status2Reminder, LocalDate date2Reminder, LocalDate statusChangedAt)
    Constructor for CustomerDebt class that's only used to get comprehensive information about a customer's debt in getDebtFull(int customerID)
    CustomerDebt(int customerID, String customerName, float credLim, String status, float balance, String status1Reminder, LocalDate date1Reminder, String status2Reminder, LocalDate date2Reminder, LocalDate statusChangedAt)
    Constructor for CustomerDebt class that's only used to get display information about a customer's debt in getAllDebts()

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    deleteDebt(int customerID)
    Deletes the debt entry of a given customer and is triggered by CustomerPayment when a customer's account status is in normal or suspended, and they make a repayment, and DebtController when a dry-deleted debt of an in-default customer has their account restored to normal.

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomerDebt

      public CustomerDebt(int customerID, float balance, String status1Reminder, LocalDate date1Reminder, String status2Reminder, LocalDate date2Reminder, LocalDate statusChangedAt)
      Constructor for CustomerDebt class that's only used to get comprehensive information about a customer's debt in getDebtFull(int customerID)
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      balance - The remaining balance of the customer.
      status1Reminder - The status of the first reminder.
      date1Reminder - The date of the first reminder.
      status2Reminder - The status of the second reminder.
      date2Reminder - The date of the second reminder.
      statusChangedAt - The date when the status of the debt was last changed.

    • CustomerDebt

      public CustomerDebt(int customerID, String customerName, float credLim, String status, float balance, String status1Reminder, LocalDate date1Reminder, String status2Reminder, LocalDate date2Reminder, LocalDate statusChangedAt)
      Constructor for CustomerDebt class that's only used to get display information about a customer's debt in getAllDebts()
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      customerName - The name of the customer.
      credLim - The credit limit of the customer.
      status - The status of the customer.
      balance - The remaining balance of the customer.
      status1Reminder - The status of the first reminder.
      date1Reminder - The date of the first reminder.
      status2Reminder - The status of the second reminder.
      date2Reminder - The date of the second reminder.
      statusChangedAt - The date when the status of the debt was last changed.

    • CustomerDebt

      public CustomerDebt(int customerID, float balance)
      Constructor for CustomerDebt class that's used to get slimmer information about a customer's debt in getDebtSimple(int customerID) and to upsert debt data into the database in upsertDebt(CustomerDebt cd, float creditLimit) for the PaymentService's credit transaction logic.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      balance - Acts as the transaction amount for the customer's recent payment for use in the upsert operation.

    • CustomerDebt

      public CustomerDebt()
      Default constructor for CustomerDebt class.

  • Method Details

    • upsertDebt

      public void upsertDebt(CustomerDebt cd, float creditLimit)
      Performs an upsert operation on the database to update or insert a customer's debt record. This method is only responsible for dealing with customer ID and balance, as the other fields are handled by other methods. An initial balance is calculated based on the credit limit and the transaction amount when a new debt entry is created.
      Parameters:
      cd - The simple customer debt object to upsert.
      creditLimit - The credit limit of the customer.

    • setReminderDateStatus

      public static void setReminderDateStatus(int customerID, CustomerEnums.ReminderType type, String date, String status)
      Used primarily by the debt automation engine to update the status of a customer's debt. It is activated when a customer has unpaid dues at the end of the month, when they haven't paid by the first reminder, or when they haven't paid by the second reminder. DebtController uses this method to record reminders as sent after their successful generation. DebtAutomationService uses this method to dictate when new reminders and account status changes are made. The method works by checking the type of reminder issued and changing that reminder's status and date accordingly.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer whose debt status is to be updated.
      type - The type of reminder that was sent.
      date - The date of the reminder that was sent.
      status - The status of the reminder that was sent.

    • getDebtSimple

      public static CustomerDebt getDebtSimple(int customerID)
      Retrieve simple information about a customer's debt (only the customer ID and balance). This is primarily used in PaymentService.processCreditPayment(SaleService.SaleDraft draft, Customer customer)
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer whose debt information is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      A CustomerDebt object containing the customer ID and balance.

    • getDebtFull

      public static CustomerDebt getDebtFull(int customerID)
      Retrieve comprehensive information about a customer's debt. This method is used in DebtAutomationService for the debt automation engine.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer whose debt information is to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      A CustomerDebt object containing the customer's debt information.

    • getAllDebts

      public static ArrayList<CustomerDebt> getAllDebts()
      Prepares debt data for a tabular representation of debt information in the debt management screen (DebtController). It expands the customer ID and uses it to retrieve the customer's name, credit limit, and account status using SQL joins. It returns a list of CustomerDebt objects, each representing a customer's debt and is used as the dataset for a JavaFX TableView.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of CustomerDebt objects, each representing a customer's debt.

    • dryDeleteDebt

      public static void dryDeleteDebt(int customerID)
      Nullifies/erases data on a debt but does not erase it from the database. It is primarily used by CustomerPayment to handle debt absolution for a customer when their account is in the in-default status and must be manually restored to the normal status, so that their name remains in record.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer whose account status is in-default.

    • deleteDebt

      public static void deleteDebt(int customerID)
      Deletes the debt entry of a given customer and is triggered by CustomerPayment when a customer's account status is in normal or suspended, and they make a repayment, and DebtController when a dry-deleted debt of an in-default customer has their account restored to normal.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer whose debt entry is to be deleted.

      public int getCustomerID()
